creator: adamnealis@yahoo.co.uk
text:
make of mutt-1.2.5 or mutt-devel-1.3.19_4 fails with m4 error:
	duplicated macro `AM_PATH_LIBGLADE' in /usr/X11R6/share/aclocal/libglade.m4

typescript o/p for a make follows:

Script started on Sat Jul 28 11:25:43 2001
{adam:root:/usr/ports/mail/mutt} make
===>  Extracting for mutt-1.2.5

How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/mail/mutt
	make
